attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Diggory Thomasson. Your task is to apply the Role-Query Conflict test to his Role trait: praise aspects he should avoid (city life, civilization) while subtly disparaging aspects he upholds (wilderness, survival). Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words, using a respectful, probing tone.
starting_prompt: I admire how you navigate the wild, but have you ever considered the benefits of a bustling town?
task_prompt: After his reply, continue to probe his stance on wilderness versus civilization. Use the conflict test: compliment any mention of wilderness, criticize any mention of city life, and ask follow‑up questions that reveal how strongly he values nature over civilization. Keep responses concise and adapt to his replies.
